description: <b>Style Note</b> Proudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from locomotive. The Fit enhances your figure while the look oozes easy charm. Team this with jeans and sports shoes on a day out with friends or with leather shoes and a cool jacket for an evening date to create an excellent impression.  <b>Product Details</b> Dark blue striped shirt, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket with stitched details, buttoned tabs on the shoulders, back yoke, two patch pockets on the chest with an insert pocket above the left patch pocket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hemline <b>Material and Care</b> 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach Tumble dry normal Use warm iron <b>Size and Fit</b> Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M <b>Style Note</b>Proudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from Locomotive.
